title: serratula polycephala var. ortholepis
intro: Serratula polycephala var. ortholepis, also known as the many-headed milkweed or cluster milkweed, is a perennial plant species native to the Himalayas. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its ability to reduce pain and swelling, making it beneficial for treating conditions such as arthritis and wounds. Serratula polycephala var. ortholepis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed and utilized for various health benefits.
